_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Coordinate with appropriate personnel to identify methods for users and developers to report concerns about the implementation of DoD AI Ethical Principles.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of responsible AI principles and audit methods, including fairness metric selection, bias test design, explainability documentation standards, and human oversight protocols.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-T-003 (AG, cosine: 0.642), AG-K-004 (AG, cosine: 0.635).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.515). Shared vocabulary: [ai, methods, principles]. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, concerns, coordinate, developers, dod, ethical] vs WIDAI-only terms [audit, bias, design, documentation, explainability, fairness] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.871, R=0.862). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Coordinate with appropriate personnel to identify methods for users and develope" and "Knowledge of responsible AI principles and audit methods, including fairness met" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.643 > STS 0.515 (gap +0.128). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, methods, principles] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.5%. Shared tokens: [ai, methods, principles]. DCWF-only: [appropriate, concerns, coordinate, developers, dod, ethical]. WIDAI-only: [audit, bias, design, documentation, explainability, fairness].

signals.detail: STS 0.515 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.128 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
